action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 8 confirmed env.sim has only agent 0 (Spot) and world-space human position can be computed from agent_0_other_agent_gps + Spot sim position. ShortestPathFollower can be given that computed goal. Analysis: This replicates the Heuristic Expert (navmesh shortest path) which in literature achieves 1.0 success. The follower + replanning every 5 steps should navigate around obstacles and approach the moving human. Decision: Update train.py to test the follower on 3 val episodes (print safe_follow steps) to verify correctness, then submit eval with the full 50-episode predict.py. This will give a strong baseline and validate the pipeline before any RL training.
